pi_items.source: Web search and website inspection confirmed target is a real public SEO testing site
Extracted from target_url; verified via web search

Website inspection via WebFetch showing comprehensive test page structure with Mobile (20), Description Tags (10), Encoding (11), Titles (17), Robots Protocol (27), Redirects (21), Links (27), URLs (47), Canonical Tags (50), Status Codes (66), Social Tags (5), Content (43), Other (19)

pi_items.verified_value: Valid SEO indexability terms: noindex (meta robots directive), canonical/canonicalised (canonical tag implementation), indexable/non-indexable (indexability status), blocked (robots.txt or other blocking)
pi_items.source: Screaming Frog documentation and SEO Spider user guide verify these are standard indexability reason classifications

pi_items.verified_value: Meta Robots (typically exported as 'Meta Robots 1', 'Meta Robots 2', etc. for multiple instances)
pi_items.source: SEO Spider Tabs documentation: Directives tab includes Meta Robots 1/2 etc columns for meta robots directives found on URLs

pi_items.verified_value: X-Robots-Tag (typically exported as 'X-Robots-Tag 1', 'X-Robots-Tag 2', etc. for multiple instances)
pi_items.source: SEO Spider Tabs documentation: Directives tab includes X-Robots-Tag 1/2 etc columns for HTTP header directives

pi_items.verified_value: Canonical Link Element (uncertain if this is in Directives tab export; may be part of separate Canonicals tab; mentioned in directives column lists but canonical auditing typically done in Canonicals tab)
pi_items.source: Web search results mention Canonical Link Element in directives context but separate Canonicals tab exists for detailed canonical auditing. Directives tab has canonical filtering but export inclusion unclear.

pi_items.verified_value: Indexability (shows whether URL is Indexable or Non-Indexable; added in Screaming Frog version 23.1+)
pi_items.source: SEO Spider Tabs documentation and Seer Interactive guide confirm Indexability column in Directives tab showing indexable/non-indexable status
Path format is valid Unix convention; cannot verify actual path existence in this environment but setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts confirm this is the expected location

privileged_info_summary: The task targets crawler-test.com, a real public website with approximately 363 test pages designed for evaluating crawler behavior across various SEO parameters. The minimum URL crawl requirement of 10 is easily satisfiable. The required report terms (noindex, canonical, indexable, blocked) are all legitimate indexability classification terms used by Screaming Frog. The Directives tab in Screaming Frog includes Meta Robots, X-Robots-Tag, and Indexability columns as claimed. The Canonical Link Element column's presence in the Directives tab export is uncertain; canonical data is typically accessed through Screaming Frog's separate Canonicals tab.
